metadata.name: cloudignite-sdk
metadata.summary: A Python SDK for interacting with CloudIgnite services

classes.name: cloudignite.sdk.CloudIgniteSDK

methods.name: cloudignite.sdk.CloudIgniteSDK.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the CloudIgniteSDK with a base URL and authorization token.

```
param base_url

The base URL for the CloudIgnite API.

param token

The authorization token for accessing the API.
```

methods.name: cloudignite.sdk.CloudIgniteSDK._headers
documentation:
Returns the common headers for all API requests.

```
return

A dictionary containing HTTP headers.
```

methods.name: cloudignite.sdk.CloudIgniteSDK.upload_file
documentation:
Upload a file to a specific bucket.

```
param bucket

The bucket ID where the file should be uploaded.

param file_path

The local file path of the file to be uploaded.

return

Response string from the server.

raises Exception

If the upload request fails.
```

methods.name: cloudignite.sdk.CloudIgniteSDK.list_files
documentation:
List files in a specific bucket.

```
param bucket

The bucket ID whose files are to be listed.

return

JSON response string from the server.

raises Exception

If the list files request fails.
```

methods.name: cloudignite.sdk.CloudIgniteSDK.get_file
documentation:
Get the download URL for a file in a specific bucket.

```
param bucket

The bucket ID where the file is located.

param filename

The name of the file to fetch.

return

JSON response string from the server.

raises Exception

If the get file request fails.
```

methods.name: cloudignite.sdk.CloudIgniteSDK.delete_file
documentation:
Delete a file from a specific bucket.

```
param bucket

The bucket ID where the file is located.

param filename

The name of the file to delete.

return

JSON response string from the server.

raises Exception

If the delete file request fails.
```
A Python SDK for interacting with the CloudIgnite file storage service.
